sections.title: Setup Required First
sections.content:
Before writing any tests, you'll need to install a test framework:

```bash
npm install -D vitest @vitest/ui happy-dom
```

Add to `package.json`:
```json
"scripts": {
  "test": "vitest",
  "test:ui": "vitest --ui"
},
"vitest": {
  "environment": "happy-dom"
}
```

---

sections.title: Gap 1 — `lib/daily-status.ts` · `generateDailyStatus()`
Gap 2 — `lib/voice-parser.ts` · `parseTrainingFromVoiceLog()`
Gap 3 — `lib/fitness.ts` · `suggestNextWeight()` & `getExerciseHistory()`
Gap 4 — `lib/storage.ts` · `getAlcoholStreak()` & `validateStorageKey()`
Gap 5 — `lib/projects.ts` · `applyProjectUpdate()` & `daysUntil()`
Gap 6 — `lib/project-parser.ts` · `parseProjectsFromVoiceLog()`
Gap 7 — `lib/xodus/brain.ts` · `runXodusBrain()`
Gap 8 — Missing Error Handling Tests (Cross-Cutting)
Integration Test Gaps
Priority Order
sections.content:
| Priority | Module | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `lib/storage.ts` | Everything else depends on it |
| 2 | `lib/daily-status.ts` | Core scoring engine, pure functions |
| 3 | `lib/fitness.ts` | Weight progression advice is trust-critical |
| 4 | `lib/voice-parser.ts` | Regex NLP is the most brittle code |
| 5 | `lib/project-parser.ts` | Alias table must be locked down |
| 6 | `lib/projects.ts` | Progress cap + date math |
| 7 | `lib/xodus/brain.ts` | Pure function, easy to test in isolation |
| 8 | Integration tests | Cover the command → parse → store pipeline |

All the lib functions are pure or near-pure — no API calls, no React — so they'll be fast and deterministic under Vitest with a `happy-dom` environment.
